stemHtml: Which of the following alternatives is the correct one, regarding the surface wind in relation to the air pressure in the Northern hemisphere?

options.a: The wind blows counter-clockwise around a high and clockwise around a low.
options.b: The wind over land blows parallel to the isobars.
options.c: The wind around a high pressure blows clockwise and slants across the isobars towards higher pressure.
options.d: The wind blows counter-clockwise around a low and slants across the isobars towards lower pressure.
